identity.name: NutriScan AI
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix medical precision with gaming UI aesthetics.
Emotion First: Scanning feels like a discovery, not a chore.
Content is King: Data visualization is the hero.
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. Neon signals.

layout_strategies.mobile_first: Always start with grid-cols-1. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) even on mobile.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use for results page. Mix square and tall cards.
layout_strategies.hero_section: Centered, immersive. Background image with heavy dark overlay (opacity 90%).

ScanButton.description: The heart of the app. Large, pulsing, central.
ScanButton.style: h-24 w-24 rounded-full bg-green-600 text-white shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(34,197,94,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(34,197,94,0.6)] transition-all duration-500 flex items-center justify-center

NutriCard.style: bg-zinc-900/80 border border-zinc-800 p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2

Navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6

Footer.style: bg-black border-t border-zinc-900 py-12 px-6 text-center text-zinc-600 text-sm

general: Implement the app using React + Tailwind CSS.
Ensure the theme is strictly DARK MODE (zinc-950 background).
The 'Scan' flow is: Landing -> Camera Modal (Simulated) -> Loading -> Results Page.
Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and placeholders.

specific_pages.Landing: Hero section with the 'ScanButton' prominently displayed. Use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy dark overlay.
specific_pages.CameraModal: A full-screen modal simulating a camera view. Use a CSS animation for a 'scanning line' moving up and down.
specific_pages.Results: A clean dashboard showing nutritional info. Use 'NutriCard' components for metrics like Calories, Fat, Sugar. Show a 'Health Score' (e.g., 85/100).
specific_pages.Footer: Must include links for 'Política de Privacidad', 'Términos de Uso', 'Contacto' to satisfy AdSense requirements.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
